A_01.label: 5 constraints H1-H5 are necessary and sufficient for m=1 stability in rotating helical Z-pinch
weaknesses: only cylindrical geometry
ideal MHD only
specific scope of profile family

A_02.label: H3 quartic Alfvén minimum is the structural ingredient absent from shear-flow-only treatments
weaknesses: singular feature regularized by Hall at finite d_i/R

A_03.label: Discrete spectrum near quartic continuum minimum accumulates as n^-4 (exponent sharp)
weaknesses: requires exact quartic — higher-order vanishing changes exponent

A_04.label: Bi-orthogonal Picone identity generalizes Newcomb node-counting to non-self-adjoint operators
weaknesses: bounded by O(M_A^2) residual; requires symmetrizable operator

A_05.label: Below SARI bound M_A<1, ideal-MHD m=1 growth rate is exactly zero in asymptotic d_i/R→0 regime
weaknesses: asymptotic limit only; Hall corrections regularize at finite d_i

A_06.label: Framework simultaneously closes five prior conjectures (Bondeson-Iacono helical, Hameiri Sturmian, n^-4 sharpness, SARI exclusion, kink obstruction)
weaknesses: each conjecture verified analytically in supplemental but not all by independent groups

A_07.label: RIGID-BELTRAMI-A double-Beltrami equilibrium achieves <β>=12.3% with all H1-H5 satisfied
weaknesses: one specific profile; experimental realization not yet demonstrated

N_01.label: Static Z-pinch at finite pressure cannot be linearly stable to m=1 in ideal MHD
weaknesses: static assumption — no flow; cylindrical only

N_02.label: Number of unstable eigenvalues equals number of interior nodes of marginal mode (Newcomb counting)
weaknesses: self-adjoint operator assumed (static, no flow)

FR_01.label: Linear MHD stability with stationary flow is governed by a non-Hermitian operator (overstability possible)
weaknesses: operator non-self-adjoint — Sturmian methods don't apply directly

H_01.label: Sufficient stability conditions for rotating screw-pinch via circle theorems and spectral bounds
weaknesses: bounds not sharp; circle theorems give region not eigenvalue

H_02.label: Essential spectrum of ideal MHD with flow consists of forward/backward Doppler-shifted Alfvén + slow continua
weaknesses: continuous spectrum analysis only — doesn't address discrete modes

B_01.label: In toroidal/cylindrical geometry, rotation mitigates but does not eliminate kink at finite pressure
weaknesses: no helical sheared flow + non-monotonic Bz tested

S_01.label: Sheared axial flow v'/(kV_A) > ~0.1 stabilizes m=0 sausage mode in static Z-pinch
weaknesses: m=0 only; specific marginal-stable equilibrium

S_02.label: ZaP experiment observes long stable period (>700× growth time) coincident with sheared sub-Alfvénic flow
weaknesses: correlation not causation; doesn't separate m=0 vs m=1

AN_01.label: Linear shear flow alone does NOT stabilize m=1 kink across realistic Z-pinch profile classes
weaknesses: linear ideal MHD; doesn't include rotation or helical Bz

AN_02.label: Required shear for m=0 stabilization scales as ~c_0(ka)/(ka)·α with α≪1; m=1 needs different mechanism
weaknesses: specific profile dependence

CK_01.label: Force-free field eq curl H = αH admits poloidal+toroidal eigenfunction solutions (Chandrasekhar-Kendall basis)
weaknesses: force-free (zero pressure) only

MY_01.label: Coupled magnetofluid admits two-parameter double-Beltrami equilibria with non-trivial flow and pressure
weaknesses: specific equilibrium family; existence not always stable

SH_01.label: Hall effect regularizes the Alfvén singularity over a layer of thickness ~d_i
weaknesses: singular-layer analysis; doesn't address global stability

ML_01.label: Hall MHD waves are fundamentally distinct from MHD waves at d_i scales
weaknesses: wave-mode analysis only

SE_01.label: In Hall regime, global whistler instabilities grow significantly faster than ideal-MHD modes
weaknesses: incompressible; differential rotation specific

GK_01.label: Super-Alfvénic Rotational Instability (SARI) emerges from overlap of forward/backward Doppler-shifted Alfvén continua
weaknesses: small-inhomogeneity asymptotic analysis primary

GK_02.label: At M_A ≥ 1 continuum overlap opens uncontrolled SARI spectrum
weaknesses: conjectured exclusion at M_A<1 — needs proof

BR_01.label: Non-axisymmetric SARI modes confirmed numerically by Legolas spectral code with growth rates comparable to MRI
weaknesses: disk equilibrium specific; large-inhomogeneity

W_01.label: Axisymmetric SMRI directly observed in liquid-metal Taylor-Couette experiment
weaknesses: axisymmetric only; not non-axisymmetric SARI

CL_01.label: Legolas finite-element MHD spectroscopy code computes full eigenspectrum for 1D equilibria with flow
weaknesses: 1D only; non-Hermitian eigenvalue problem

DJ_01.label: Legolas extension with viscosity and Hall current benchmarked against historic results
weaknesses: non-ideal but still 1D

CR_01.label: Kadomtsev's interchange criterion has an entropy-gradient interpretation analogous to Schwarzschild-Ledoux
weaknesses: interchange-focused; doesn't address kink

Z_01.label: FuZE experimentally demonstrates sustained ~5μs neutron production during ~16μs quiescent period
weaknesses: operational characterization; not stability mechanism

ev_atlas_pseudospec.label: ε-pseudospectrum boundary < 4.1e-7 τ_A^-1 in upper half-plane (no transient growth)

ev_atlas_newcomb_bench.label: ARPACK recovers Newcomb 1960 m=1 eigenvalues to 1e-5 relative accuracy

ev_atlas_120pts.label: All 120 (m,k) points satisfy |γ|<1e-11 τ_A^-1; worst case (2,0.69): 5.8e-12

ev_atlas_h1_violate.label: Violating H1 (q_min=0.92) produces unstable kink γ ≈ 0.18 τ_A^-1

ev_atlas_h3_violate.label: Violating H3 (monotonic F) gives only n^-2 Suydam accumulation; γ ≈ 4.2e-3 τ_A^-1

ev_newcomb_static.label: Static finite-β Z-pinch has unstable m=1 spectrum (Suydam-style)

ev_shumlak_threshold.label: m=0 stabilization at v'/(kV_A) ≈ 0.1 demonstrated numerically

ev_shumlak_zap.label: ZaP stable period 15-20μs (>700× growth time) coincident with shear

ev_angus_m1_persists.label: m=1 kink remains unstable γ ~ O(v_i/a) at all tested shear levels on realistic profiles
ev_angus_m1_persists.context_label: linear ideal MHD, axial-only shear, non-helical Bz

ev_angus_m0_scaling.label: m=0 shear-stabilization scaling du_z/dr ~ c_0/(ka)·α with α<<1

ev_bondeson_toroidal.label: Toroidal rotation mitigates but doesn't eliminate kink (cylindrical analog)

ev_goedbloed_sari.label: SARI modes fill 2D continua in eigenfrequency plane for |k|>>|m| at M_A>1

ev_brughmans_growth.label: Non-axisymmetric SARI growth rates comparable to MRI at high mode numbers

ev_shiraishi_dilayer.label: Hall-MHD solutions converge to ideal MHD outside d_i-scale neighborhood of singularity

ev_sainterme_whistler.label: Global whistler instabilities grow significantly faster than ideal-MHD modes at d_i/L ~ few%

ev_wang_smri.label: Axisymmetric SMRI onset observed at critical Rm in Taylor-Couette liquid metal

ev_zhang_neutrons.label: FuZE: ~5μs sustained neutron emission, (1.25±0.45)×10^5 n/pulse, scaling with n_D^2

ev_crews_entropy.label: Kadomtsev marginal-stable profile has entropy-gradient interpretation analogous to Schwarzschild-Ledoux

ev_hameiri_continuum.label: Ideal MHD with flow has forward/backward Doppler-shifted Alfvén continua governing essential spectrum

ev_friman_overstable.label: Stationary-flow MHD operator is non-Hermitian → overstability possible

ev_chandra_ck.label: Force-free field eq curl H=αH solvable in poloidal+toroidal basis with equipartition

ev_mahajan_db.label: Double-curl Beltrami equilibrium admits non-trivial pressure confining minimum-|B| configuration

ev_legolas_bench.label: Legolas reproduces canonical MHD spectra: Parker, interchange, KH, tearing, magneto-thermal

edges.comment: A_01 predicts kink stable under H1-H5

A_01 necessity: violating H3 destabilizes; matches

A_05 OUT of regime: Angus profiles lack H3; Atlas predicts m=1 persists (matches)
A_05 OUT of regime: Bondeson toroidal lacks H3; Atlas predicts kink persists (matches)
A_02 (H3 is the missing ingredient) predicts that absence of H3 in Angus → m=1 persists; matches

A_05 boundary: Brughmans SARI at M_A≥1; expected (matches)

iterations.name: narrow_to_toroidal_without_H3
iterations.description: B_01 narrowed: toroidal rotation alone (without H3 quartic + helical shear) mitigates but doesn't eliminate kink.
iterations.weakness: no non-monotonic Bz or helical sheared flow tested

iterations.name: narrow_to_static_regime
iterations.description: N_01 narrowed: m=1 obstruction holds in STATIC Z-pinch at finite pressure (out-of-regime weak for rotating helical).
iterations.weakness: static assumption — extension to rotating helical is non-trivial

iterations.name: narrow_to_no_H3_profiles
iterations.description: AN_01 narrowed: linear axial shear alone (without H3 quartic structure) does not stabilize m=1 across tested profile families.
iterations.weakness: tested profile families lack H3 quartic minimum — Atlas's structural ingredient

applied_rewrites.name: narrow_to_toroidal_without_H3
applied_rewrites.description: B_01 narrowed: toroidal rotation alone (without H3 quartic + helical shear) mitigates but doesn't eliminate kink.
applied_rewrites.weakness: no non-monotonic Bz or helical sheared flow tested

applied_rewrites.name: narrow_to_static_regime
applied_rewrites.description: N_01 narrowed: m=1 obstruction holds in STATIC Z-pinch at finite pressure (out-of-regime weak for rotating helical).
applied_rewrites.weakness: static assumption — extension to rotating helical is non-trivial

applied_rewrites.name: narrow_to_no_H3_profiles
applied_rewrites.description: AN_01 narrowed: linear axial shear alone (without H3 quartic structure) does not stabilize m=1 across tested profile families.
applied_rewrites.weakness: tested profile families lack H3 quartic minimum — Atlas's structural ingredient
